caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned against a plain, dark grey background, wearing a light green top with red floral embroidery and a dark necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a logo and the text "NPTEL" are visible. In the beginning, she is looking forward and speaking with a slight smile. She then lowers her gaze toward the bottom of the frame, appearing to look down at notes or a screen. Finally, she looks back up and continues speaking with her mouth open. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, focusing on her from the chest up, while her head movements and facial expressions are the only dynamic elements of the scene.
